name: chat
description: Foundational chat primitives: $conversational feature, $match scaffolding, sentinel match objects, $room/$exit geography, $chatroom template class, and the $portable/$furniture base classes other catalogs build on. No instances seeded — install @local:demoworld for the bundled Living Room demo.

verbs.name: match_object
verbs.source: verb :match_object(name, location) rxd { return $failed_match; }

verbs.name: match_verb
verbs.source: verb :match_verb(name, target) rxd { return $failed_match; }

verbs.name: parse_command
verbs.source: verb :parse_command(text, who) rxd { return { text: text, actor: who }; }

classes.description: Stable sentinel returned when no visible object matches.
Stable sentinel returned when multiple visible objects match.
LambdaCore-shaped room base. Rooms are spaces with contents, present actors, exit-object lookup, room-authored look output, and announce/tell fanout helpers.

verbs.name: look_self
verbs.source: verb :look_self() rxd { return { id: this, title: this.name, description: this.description }; }

verbs.name: announce
verbs.source: verb :announce(text) rxd { return this:announce_all_but([actor], text); }

verbs.name: announce_all
verbs.source: verb :announce_all(text) rxd { return this:announce_all_but([], text); }

verbs.name: announce_all_but
verbs.source: verb :announce_all_but(ignore, text, origin) rxd { for listener in this.subscribers { if (!(listener in ignore)) { observe_to_space(this, { type: "text", target: listener, actor: actor, text: text, body: text, ts: now() }); } } for item in contents(this) { if (item != origin) { let matched = $match:match_verb("hear_parent_announce", item); if (typeof(matched) == "map") { try { item:hear_parent_announce(ignore, text); } except err { } } } } return true; }

verbs.name: match_exit
verbs.source: verb :match_exit(name) rxd { let exits = this.exits; if (name in exits) { return exits[name]; } return $failed_match; }

verbs.name: acceptable
verbs.source: verb :acceptable(object) rxd { return true; }

verbs.name: enterfunc
verbs.source: verb :enterfunc(object) rx { return true; }

verbs.name: exitfunc
verbs.source: verb :exitfunc(object) rx { return true; }

verbs.name: north
verbs.source: verb :north() rxd { set_task_perms(caller_perms()); return this:go("north"); }

verbs.name: northeast
verbs.source: verb :northeast() rxd { set_task_perms(caller_perms()); return this:go("northeast"); }

verbs.name: east
verbs.source: verb :east() rxd { set_task_perms(caller_perms()); return this:go("east"); }

verbs.name: southeast
verbs.source: verb :southeast() rxd { set_task_perms(caller_perms()); return this:go("southeast"); }

verbs.name: south
verbs.source: verb :south() rxd { set_task_perms(caller_perms()); return this:go("south"); }

verbs.name: southwest
verbs.source: verb :southwest() rxd { set_task_perms(caller_perms()); return this:go("southwest"); }

verbs.name: west
verbs.source: verb :west() rxd { set_task_perms(caller_perms()); return this:go("west"); }

verbs.name: northwest
verbs.source: verb :northwest() rxd { set_task_perms(caller_perms()); return this:go("northwest"); }

verbs.name: out
verbs.source: verb :out() rxd { set_task_perms(caller_perms()); return this:go("out"); }

verbs.name: go
verbs.source: verb :go(exit) rxd { set_task_perms(caller_perms()); let exit_obj = this:match_exit(exit); if (exit_obj == $failed_match) { let msg = "You can't go that way (" + exit + ")."; tell(actor, msg); return msg; } return exit_obj:invoke(); }

verbs.name: take
verbs.source: verb :take(object) rxd { let name = str_trim(object); if (!name) { raise { code: "E_INVARG", message: "take requires an object name" }; } let item = $match:match_object(name, this); if (item == $ambiguous_match) { raise { code: "E_AMBIGUOUS", message: "I don't know which " + str_char(34) + name + str_char(34) + " you mean.", value: name }; } if (item == $failed_match || item == this || location(item) != this) { raise { code: "E_INVARG", message: "I don't see " + str_char(34) + name + str_char(34) + " here.", value: name }; } if (item == actor || (item in this.subscribers)) { raise { code: "E_PERM", message: "actors are not carryable", value: item }; } let title = ""; try { title = item:title(); } except err { title = ""; } if (!title) { title = to_string(item); } let portable = false; try { portable = item.portable; } except err { portable = false; } if (portable != true) { raise { code: "E_PERM", message: title + " is not carryable", value: item }; } moveto(item, actor); tell(actor, "You take " + title + "."); observe({ type: "taken", actor: actor, item: item, text: actor.name + " takes " + title + ".", ts: now() }); return { item: item, title: title }; }

verbs.name: drop
verbs.source: verb :drop(object) rxd { let name = str_trim(object); if (!name) { raise { code: "E_INVARG", message: "drop requires an object name" }; } let item = $match:match_object(name, actor); if (item == $failed_match || item == $ambiguous_match || location(item) != actor) { raise { code: "E_INVARG", message: "You are not carrying " + str_char(34) + name + str_char(34) + ".", value: name }; } let title = ""; try { title = item:title(); } except err { title = ""; } if (!title) { title = to_string(item); } moveto(item, this); tell(actor, "You drop " + title + "."); observe({ type: "dropped", actor: actor, item: item, room: this, text: actor.name + " drops " + title + ".", ts: now() }); return { item: item, title: title, room: this }; }

classes.description: First-class room exit. Exits live in their source room's anchor cluster, carry aliases and movement messages, and invoke the LambdaCore-style moveto path.

verbs.name: invoke
verbs.source: verb :invoke() rxd { set_task_perms(caller_perms()); return this:move(actor); }

verbs.name: move
verbs.source: verb :move(who) rxd { if (who != actor) { raise { code: "E_PERM", message: "exits only move the invoking actor", value: who }; } let source = this.source; let dest = this.dest; if (this.nogo_msg) { tell(who, this.nogo_msg); if (this.onogo_msg) { source:announce_all_but([who], who.name + " " + this.onogo_msg); } return this.nogo_msg; } if (!dest) { let msg = "You can't go that way."; tell(who, msg); return msg; } if (this.leave_msg) { tell(who, this.leave_msg); } moveto(who, dest); let left_text = who.name + " " + this.oleave_msg; observe_to_space(source, { type: "left", actor: who, room: source, destination: dest, exit: this.name, text: left_text, ts: now() }); if (this.arrive_msg) { tell(who, this.arrive_msg); } let entered_text = who.name + " " + this.oarrive_msg; observe_to_space(dest, { type: "entered", actor: who, room: dest, origin: source, exit: this.name, text: entered_text, ts: now() }); return { room: dest, from: source, exit: this.name, here_request: true, look_deferred: true }; }

verbs.name: announce_msg
verbs.source: verb :announce_msg(place, who, text) rxd { return place:announce_all_but([who], who.name + " " + text); }

classes.description: Standalone chat room class. Conversational behavior comes from $conversational; inherited $room verbs provide exit-object movement and carryable object movement.
Carryable room object. Instances can move between room contents and actor inventory without changing host placement.

verbs.name: give
verbs.source: verb :give(recipient) rxd { let recipient_str = str_trim(recipient); if (!recipient_str) { raise { code: "E_INVARG", message: "Give it to whom?" }; } if (location(this) != actor) { raise { code: "E_INVARG", message: "You don't have that!", value: this }; } let here = location(actor); if (here == null) { raise { code: "E_INVARG", message: "I see no " + str_char(34) + recipient_str + str_char(34) + " here." }; } let who = $match:match_object(recipient_str, here); if (who == $ambiguous_match) { raise { code: "E_AMBIGUOUS", message: "I don't know which " + str_char(34) + recipient_str + str_char(34) + " you mean.", value: recipient_str }; } let here_recipient = false; if (who != $failed_match && location(who) == here) { here_recipient = true; } if (who != $failed_match && !here_recipient) { here_recipient = (here in all_locations(who)); } if (who == $failed_match || !here_recipient) { raise { code: "E_INVARG", message: "I see no " + str_char(34) + recipient_str + str_char(34) + " here.", value: recipient_str }; } if (who == actor) { raise { code: "E_INVARG", message: "Give it to yourself?" }; } let item_title = ""; try { item_title = this:title(); } except err { item_title = ""; } if (!item_title) { item_title = to_string(this); } let who_title = ""; try { who_title = who:title(); } except err { who_title = ""; } if (!who_title) { who_title = to_string(who); } moveto(this, who); if (location(this) != who) { raise { code: "E_PERM", message: who_title + " does not want that item.", value: who }; } tell(actor, "You hand " + item_title + " to " + who_title + "."); tell(who, actor.name + " hands you " + item_title + "."); return { item: this, recipient: who }; }

classes.description: Fixed room furnishing. It appears in room look output but is not carryable.

features.description: Feature object carrying live chat verbs for spaces.

verbs.name: can_be_attached_by
verbs.source: verb :can_be_attached_by(who) rxd { return true; }

verbs.name: say
verbs.source: verb :say(text) rxd { if (!text) { raise { code: "E_INVARG", message: "say requires text" }; } observe({ type: "said", actor: actor, text: text, ts: now() }); return true; }

verbs.name: say_to
verbs.source: verb :say_to(recipient, text) rxd { if (!text) { raise { code: "E_INVARG", message: "say_to requires text" }; } if (recipient != null && recipient != this && recipient != actor && !isa(recipient, $player)) { let matched = $match:match_verb("on_say_to", recipient); if (typeof(matched) == "map") { return recipient:on_say_to(text); } } let audience = []; for listener in this.subscribers { if (recipient == actor || listener != recipient) { audience = audience + [listener]; } } observe({ type: "said_to", actor: actor, to: recipient, text: text, ts: now(), _audience_override: audience }); /* Non-player command recipients returned above through :on_say_to; only players get targeted [to you] text. */ if (recipient != null && recipient != actor && isa(recipient, $player)) { tell(recipient, actor.name + " [to you] " + text); } return true; }

verbs.name: say_as
verbs.source: verb :say_as(style, text) rxd { if (!text) { raise { code: "E_INVARG", message: "say_as requires text" }; } observe({ type: "said_as", actor: actor, style: style, text: text, ts: now() }); return true; }

verbs.name: emote
verbs.source: verb :emote(text) rxd { if (!text) { raise { code: "E_INVARG", message: "emote requires text" }; } observe({ type: "emoted", actor: actor, text: text, ts: now() }); return true; }

verbs.name: pose
verbs.source: verb :pose(text) rxd { if (!text) { raise { code: "E_INVARG", message: "pose requires text" }; } observe({ type: "posed", actor: actor, text: text, ts: now() }); return true; }

verbs.name: quote
verbs.source: verb :quote(text) rxd { if (!text) { raise { code: "E_INVARG", message: "quote requires text" }; } observe({ type: "quoted", actor: actor, text: text, ts: now() }); return true; }

verbs.name: self
verbs.source: verb :self(text) rxd { if (!text) { raise { code: "E_INVARG", message: "self requires text" }; } observe({ type: "self_pointed", actor: actor, text: text, ts: now() }); return true; }

verbs.name: tell
verbs.source: verb :tell(recipient, text) rxd { if (!text) { raise { code: "E_INVARG", message: "tell requires text" }; } observe({ type: "told", from: actor, to: recipient, text: text, ts: now() }); return true; }

verbs.name: look
verbs.source: verb :look() rxd { return this:look_at(this); }

verbs.name: look_at
verbs.source: verb :look_at(target) rxd { set_task_perms(caller_perms()); let view = dispatch(target, "look_self", []); let text = ""; if (typeof(view) == "map") { if (has(view, "description") && view["description"]) { text = view["description"]; } if (has(view, "present_actors")) { let names = ""; try { names = str_join(collect_prop(view["present_actors"], "name"), ", "); } except err { names = ""; } if (!names) { names = "nobody"; } if (text) { text = text + " "; } text = text + "Present: " + names + "."; } if (has(view, "contents")) { let things = ""; /* contents are preformatted by look_self */ for item in view["contents"] { if (things) { things = things + ", "; } if (typeof(item) == "map" && has(item, "title")) { things = things + item["title"]; } else { things = things + to_string(item); } } if (things) { if (text) { text = text + " "; } text = text + "You see " + things + "."; } } if (has(view, "mood") && view["mood"]) { if (text) { text = text + " "; } text = text + "Mood: " + view["mood"] + "."; } } else { text = to_string(view); } observe({ type: "looked", actor: actor, to: actor, room: this, target: target, text: text, look: view, ts: now() }); return view; }

verbs.name: who
verbs.source: verb :who() rxd { observe({ type: "who", actor: actor, to: actor, room: this, present_actors: this.subscribers, text: "Present.", ts: now() }); return this.subscribers; }

verbs.name: enter
verbs.source: verb :enter(who) rxd { let old = location(actor); if (old != null && old != this && old != $nowhere) { try { observe_to_space(old, { type: "left", actor: actor, room: old, destination: this, text: actor.name + " left.", ts: now() }); } except err { } } moveto(actor, this); observe_to_space(this, { type: "entered", actor: actor, room: this, origin: old, text: actor.name + " entered.", ts: now() }); return { room: this, present_actors: this.subscribers, here_request: true, look_deferred: true }; }

verbs.name: leave
verbs.source: verb :leave(who) rxd { moveto(actor, actor.home); observe_to_space(this, { type: "left", actor: actor, room: this, text: actor.name + " left.", ts: now() }); let remaining = []; for s in this.subscribers { if (s != actor) { remaining = remaining + [s]; } } return remaining; }

verbs.name: huh
verbs.source: verb :huh(text, reason) rxd { observe({ type: "huh", actor: actor, text: text, reason: reason, ts: now() }); return false; }

verbs.name: huh_plan
verbs.source: verb :huh_plan(text, reason) rxd { this:huh(text, reason); return { ok: false, route: "huh", target: this, verb: "huh", args: [text, reason], error: reason, text: text }; }

verbs.name: directed_plan
verbs.source: verb :directed_plan(rest, verb_name, original) rxd { rest = str_trim(rest); let cmd = $match:parse_command(verb_name + " " + rest, actor, this); let target = cmd["dobj_prefix"]; let directed_text = cmd["dobj_prefix_rest"]; if (target == null || !directed_text) { return this:huh_plan(original, "Directed speech needs a recipient and text."); } return { ok: true, route: "direct", space: null, target: this, verb: verb_name, args: [target, directed_text], cmd: cmd }; }

verbs.name: object_command_plan
verbs.source: verb :object_command_plan(cmd, original) rxd { let target = null; if (has(cmd, "dobj_prefix")) { target = cmd["dobj_prefix"]; } if (target == null || target == this) { return null; } let rest = null; if (has(cmd, "dobj_prefix_rest")) { rest = cmd["dobj_prefix_rest"]; } if (!has(cmd, "verb")) { if (rest) { let say_matched = $match:match_verb("on_say_to", target); if (typeof(say_matched) == "map") { return { ok: true, route: "direct", space: null, target: target, verb: say_matched["name"], args: [rest], cmd: cmd }; } } return null; } let matched = $match:match_verb(cmd["verb"], target); if (typeof(matched) != "map") { return null; } let route = "direct"; let plan_space = null; if (!matched["direct_callable"]) { route = "sequenced"; plan_space = this; } let call_args = []; if (rest) { call_args = [rest]; } return { ok: true, route: route, space: plan_space, target: target, verb: matched["name"], args: call_args, cmd: cmd }; }

verbs.name: command_plan
verbs.source: verb :command_plan(input) rxd { let text = str_trim(input); if (!text) { return this:huh_plan(input, "empty command"); } if (str_starts(text, "/me ")) { let emote_msg = str_trim(str_slice(text, 5)); return { ok: true, route: "direct", space: null, target: this, verb: "emote", args: [emote_msg], cmd: $match:parse_command("emote " + emote_msg, actor, this) }; } if (str_starts(text, ":") && length(text) > 1) { let colon_msg = str_trim(str_slice(text, 2)); return { ok: true, route: "direct", space: null, target: this, verb: "emote", args: [colon_msg], cmd: $match:parse_command("emote " + colon_msg, actor, this) }; } if (str_starts(text, "]") && length(text) > 1) { let pose_msg = str_trim(str_slice(text, 2)); return { ok: true, route: "direct", space: null, target: this, verb: "pose", args: [pose_msg], cmd: $match:parse_command("pose " + pose_msg, actor, this) }; } if (str_starts(text, "|") && length(text) > 1) { let quote_msg = str_trim(str_slice(text, 2)); return { ok: true, route: "direct", space: null, target: this, verb: "quote", args: [quote_msg], cmd: $match:parse_command("quote " + quote_msg, actor, this) }; } if (str_starts(text, "<") && length(text) > 1) { let self_msg = str_trim(str_slice(text, 2)); return { ok: true, route: "direct", space: null, target: this, verb: "self", args: [self_msg], cmd: $match:parse_command("self " + self_msg, actor, this) }; } if (str_starts(text, str_char(34)) && length(text) > 1) { let say_msg = str_trim(str_slice(text, 2)); return { ok: true, route: "direct", space: null, target: this, verb: "say", args: [say_msg], cmd: $match:parse_command("say " + say_msg, actor, this) }; } if (str_starts(text, "`") && length(text) > 1) { return this:directed_plan(str_slice(text, 2), "say_to", text); } if (str_starts(text, "[")) { let close = str_index(text, "]"); if (close > 2) { let style = str_trim(str_slice(text, 2, close - 1)); let styled_text = str_trim(str_slice(text, close + 1)); if (str_starts(styled_text, ":")) { styled_text = str_trim(str_slice(styled_text, 2)); } if (!style || !styled_text) { return this:huh_plan(text, "Styled speech needs a style and text."); } return { ok: true, route: "direct", space: null, target: this, verb: "say_as", args: [style, styled_text], cmd: $match:parse_command("say_as " + styled_text, actor, this) }; } } if (str_starts(str_lower(text), "/tell ")) { return this:directed_plan(str_slice(text, 7), "tell", text); } let cmd = $match:parse_command(text, actor, this); if (!has(cmd, "verb")) { let bare_object_plan = this:object_command_plan(cmd, text); if (bare_object_plan != null) { return bare_object_plan; } let bare_room_verb = $match:match_verb(text, this); if (typeof(bare_room_verb) == "map") { let bare_route = "direct"; let bare_space = null; if (!bare_room_verb["direct_callable"]) { bare_route = "sequenced"; bare_space = this; } return { ok: true, route: bare_route, space: bare_space, target: this, verb: bare_room_verb["name"], args: [], cmd: cmd }; } if (!str_starts(text, "/")) { return { ok: true, route: "direct", space: null, target: this, verb: "say", args: [text], cmd: cmd }; } return this:huh_plan(text, "I don't see " + text + "."); } let verb_name = str_lower(cmd["verb"]); let argstr = cmd["argstr"]; if (verb_name == "help" || verb_name == "?" || verb_name == "info" || verb_name == "information" || verb_name == "@help") { return { ok: true, route: "direct", space: null, target: actor, verb: "help", args: [argstr], cmd: cmd }; } if (verb_name == "say") { if (!argstr) { return this:huh_plan(text, "Say what?"); } return { ok: true, route: "direct", space: null, target: this, verb: "say", args: [argstr], cmd: cmd }; } if (verb_name == "emote" || verb_name == "pose") { if (!argstr) { return this:huh_plan(text, verb_name + " needs text."); } return { ok: true, route: "direct", space: null, target: this, verb: verb_name, args: [argstr], cmd: cmd }; } if (verb_name == "tell" || verb_name == "whisper" || verb_name == "page") { return this:directed_plan(argstr, "tell", text); } if ((verb_name == "look" || verb_name == "l" || verb_name == "examine" || verb_name == "ex") && argstr) { let look_target = null; if (has(cmd, "dobj_prefix")) { look_target = cmd["dobj_prefix"]; } if (look_target == null && has(cmd, "dobj") && cmd["dobj"] != null) { look_target = cmd["dobj"]; } if (look_target == null && has(cmd, "iobj") && cmd["iobj"] != null) { look_target = cmd["iobj"]; } if (look_target == null) { return this:huh_plan(text, "I don't see " + argstr + "."); } return { ok: true, route: "direct", space: null, target: this, verb: "look_at", args: [look_target], cmd: cmd }; } if (verb_name == "describe" || verb_name == "@describe" || verb_name == "@desc") { let desc_dobj_str = cmd["dobjstr"]; let desc_iobj_str = cmd["iobjstr"]; let desc_dobj = cmd["dobj"]; if (!desc_dobj_str || cmd["prep"] != "as") { return this:huh_plan(text, "Try: @describe <thing> as <text>."); } if (desc_dobj == null) { return this:huh_plan(text, "I don't see " + str_char(34) + desc_dobj_str + str_char(34) + "."); } return { ok: true, route: "direct", space: null, target: desc_dobj, verb: "set_description", args: [desc_iobj_str], cmd: cmd }; } if (verb_name == "give" || verb_name == "hand") { let prep = cmd["prep"]; let dobj_str = cmd["dobjstr"]; let iobj_str = cmd["iobjstr"]; let dobj_resolved = cmd["dobj"]; if (!dobj_str || (prep != "to" && prep != "at") || !iobj_str) { return this:huh_plan(text, "Try: give <thing> to <person>."); } if (dobj_resolved == null || location(dobj_resolved) != actor) { return this:huh_plan(text, "You don't have " + str_char(34) + dobj_str + str_char(34) + "."); } return { ok: true, route: "direct", space: null, target: dobj_resolved, verb: "give", args: [iobj_str], cmd: cmd }; } if (verb_name == "inventory" || verb_name == "i" || verb_name == "inv") { return { ok: true, route: "direct", space: null, target: actor, verb: "inventory", args: [], cmd: cmd }; } if (verb_name == "home" || verb_name == "@home") { return { ok: true, route: "direct", space: null, target: actor, verb: "home", args: [], cmd: cmd }; } if (verb_name == "drop" && !argstr) { return this:huh_plan(text, "Drop what?"); } let object_plan = this:object_command_plan(cmd, text); if (object_plan != null) { return object_plan; } let room_verb = $match:match_verb(cmd["verb"], this); if (typeof(room_verb) == "map") { let route = "direct"; let plan_space = null; if (!room_verb["direct_callable"]) { route = "sequenced"; plan_space = this; } let room_args = []; if (argstr) { let room_arg = argstr; let spec = room_verb["arg_spec"]; if (has(cmd, "dobj_prefix") && cmd["dobj_prefix"] != null && typeof(spec) == "map" && has(spec, "resolve") && spec["resolve"] == "object") { room_arg = cmd["dobj_prefix"]; } room_args = [room_arg]; } return { ok: true, route: route, space: plan_space, target: this, verb: room_verb["name"], args: room_args, cmd: cmd }; } let dobj_target = null; if (has(cmd, "dobj_prefix")) { dobj_target = cmd["dobj_prefix"]; } if (dobj_target != null && dobj_target != this) { return this:huh_plan(text, to_string(dobj_target) + " does not understand " + cmd["verb"] + "."); } if (!str_starts(text, "/")) { return { ok: true, route: "direct", space: null, target: this, verb: "say", args: [text], cmd: cmd }; } return this:huh_plan(text, "I don't see " + argstr + "."); }

verbs.name: command
verbs.source: verb :command(text) rxd { let plan = this:command_plan(text); if (!plan["ok"] || plan["route"] != "direct") { return plan; } set_task_perms(caller_perms()); return dispatch(plan["target"], plan["verb"], plan["args"]); }

features.description: Feature object for acoustically transparent spaces. Local public speech reaches the space audience and is forwarded upward to the containing space; parent room announcements are also heard inside.

verbs.name: announce
verbs.source: verb :announce(text) rxd { return this:announce_all_but([actor], text); }

verbs.name: announce_all
verbs.source: verb :announce_all(text) rxd { return this:announce_all_but([], text); }

verbs.name: announce_all_but
verbs.source: verb :announce_all_but(ignore, text, origin) rxd { for listener in this.subscribers { if (!(listener in ignore)) { observe_to_space(this, { type: "text", target: listener, actor: actor, text: text, body: text, ts: now() }); } } let parent = location(this); if (parent != null && parent != this && isa(parent, $space)) { try { parent:announce_all_but(ignore, text, this); } except err { } } return true; }

verbs.name: hear_parent_announce
verbs.source: verb :hear_parent_announce(ignore, text) rxd { for listener in this.subscribers { if (!(listener in ignore)) { observe_to_space(this, { type: "text", target: listener, actor: actor, text: text, body: text, ts: now() }); } } return true; }

verbs.name: say

features.description: Feature object for cone-of-silence spaces. Parent room announcements are heard inside, but public speech from inside stays local unless another feature forwards it.

verbs.name: hear_parent_announce
verbs.source: verb :hear_parent_announce(ignore, text) rxd { for listener in this.subscribers { if (!(listener in ignore)) { observe_to_space(this, { type: "text", target: listener, actor: actor, text: text, body: text, ts: now() }); } } return true; }
